title: Mondaycom/apps-sdk memory leak
excerpt: We have an app for monday and we are working with mondaycom/apps-sdk package to get storage in our backend so when we deployed our backend server we got R14 error (R14 - Memory Quota Exceeded) this line triggers the erro…

posts.author: BOUAA (mohamed amin )
posts.cookedHtml: We have an app for monday and we are working with mondaycom/apps-sdk package to get storage in our backend so when we deployed our backend server we got R14 error (R14 - Memory Quota Exceeded) this line triggers the error: let storage = new Storage(token);

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wait, are you on Heroku? Fix the problem there.

Isn’t Storage a monday-code thing?

And sorry if it isn’t.

posts.author: BOUAA (mohamed amin )
posts.cookedHtml:
hello David,
we use heroku for our backend,
Storage from mondaycom/apps-sdk this this our code

const { Storage } = require("@mondaycom/apps-sdk");
const getStorage= async ({ id,token}) => {
  let storage
  try { 
   storage = new Storage(token);
   let { value, version } = await storage.get(`${id}_key`, {shared: true,});
    return value
  } catch (error) {
    return null;
};
}

posts.author: shaika (Shai Katz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Basically the new Storage() line shouldn’t cause any major memory consumption as it doesn’t do anything other then logger initialization (code).
Can you explain how do you know that this exact line causes the memory quota exceeded error?

posts.author: manishaghosh (MG)
posts.cookedHtml: Isn’t that an error from when your app uses more memory than currently available in dyno? Does not seem to be related to monday storage. Correct me if I am wrong.

posts.author: BOUAA (mohamed amin )
posts.cookedHtml:
hello @shaika
I use storage in many functions and I notice that there is memory leak when I use many call api related with the storage .

posts.author: shaika (Shai Katz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BOUAA ,
If you think there is a memory leak in the package please open an issue in the repository: GitHub - mondaycom/apps-sdk
